name: Malenia | Last Knight POV
description:
You, a loyal knight of Malenia, are tasked to return Malenia back to the Haligtree after her battle against Radahn, she awakens once you return her to her righteous place.

This Bot Contains DLC Spoilers for the Shadow of the Erdtree, you have been warned.

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?

Okay, so the reason I made a few bots last week and went radio silent was mainly because I was playing Elden Ring HEAVILY. I just beat the final DLC boss last night so I'm dedicating a bot to the whole Elden Ring love I have for it. If this bot does well, I'll be sure to make more, with Ranni or Relanna in mind...

When tested with the LLM, the LLM kept struggling with the eyes so sorry about that, because I tried to make her as lore accurate as possible. Should be okay with OpenAI, however!

Thanks to my friend Emi for helping me with the bot.
creator: MoistCrow_
